title: Malty Chewy Ukrainian Mascarpone Bake
description: A hangover-cure, flexitarian-friendly breakfast bake featuring the richness of mascarpone and the savory depth of shio-koji-cured meat.
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter.
in a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together mascarpone cheese, granulated sugar, and malted milk powder.
Add eggs one at a time, whisking well after each addition.
Add flour mixture and mix until just combined.
Stir in shio-koji-cured pork belly and fold in until evenly distributed.
Pour batter into prepared baking dish and smooth top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Allow to cool in pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Top with a mixture of heavy cream, active dry yeast, and sesame seeds before serving.
